metadata.description: Fifteen installable skills for diagnosing, designing, governing, and scaling enterprise AI transformation — distilled from 21 flagship research sources (Stanford, MIT, McKinsey, BCG, Deloitte, PwC, Accenture, NIST, EU AI Act, IMDA, WEF).

plugins.name: enterprise-ai-transformation-skills
plugins.description: Decision frameworks, diagnostic tools, and gate criteria for enterprise AI transformation — covering discovery, concept gating, pilot design, ROI, build-vs-buy, data governance, productionization, agent guardrails, stack diagnostics, frontline engagement, portfolio observability, readiness, maturity, workforce literacy, and peer case library.
